description: 100-step smoke test for OEST* peripheral distribution training. Verifies peripheral loss computes without errors, PD-DIAG output appears, and no NaN.
notes: Smoke test: verify OEST* peripheral loss (Ming et al., arXiv:2412.03058) integrates correctly. Check PD-DIAG output, E_gap positive, no NaN. Uses TAM mining as base (same as q225) with peripheral loss added on top.
